2133130.name: PenguINN
2133130.description:
PenguINN is a classic single-player 2D platformer that takes you on a journey through a dream world made in AI-generated art. Collect beautiful art by completing 100 levels before waking up from your dream.

  • Classic action: "Jump", "Dash", and "Climb" to complete the level. Sounds too simple? It’s challenging too you know!

  • Time limit to clear 100 levels: This game has a time limit. The more stars you collect in each level, the longer you can stay in the dream world. Play repeatedly to reach the deepest level of your dream before you wake up!

  • Beautiful AI-generated art: Each level features beautiful background art created by Midjourney, an image-generating AI. All 100 levels have different background art. You can view the background art of each level you have cleared in the gallery. And one more thing! You'll also find all the art PROMPT in the gallery!

  • Kawaii penguin character: PenguINN is a game in which you control a cute penguin character. This penguin can even be a NINJA! Because this is an adventure in a dream world.
2133130.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯语, 乌克兰语, 荷兰语, 希腊语, 瑞典语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 泰语, 捷克语, 丹麦语, 土耳其语, 挪威语, 匈牙利语, 芬兰语, 保加利亚语, 越南语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 波兰语, 罗马尼亚语, 俄语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 韩语
